_doc: Implementation backlog for the single sequential Ralph loop. SOURCE OF TRUTH for done/not-done + dependency order; docs/HARNESS.md §8.1 = schema. Each task's `do` + `done-when` live in a per-task Markdown spec at the `spec` path (.harness/tasks/TNNN.md, sections '## Do' / '## Done when'); every BUILDABLE task carries `facets` (difficulty auto-tuning) — gated (gate / needs-human) tasks are carved out and carry neither.

tasks.title: Document the harness dashboard in README
